title: Amen
body:
{comment: Intro}
[Bm]  

{comment: Verse 1}
[Bm]I'm tired of this game, I'm tired of this race
I'm tired of these [D]chains that bind me
[Bm]Wanna be free, free to let go
Let all that is good [D]inspire me

(Pre Chorus)
And [G]I...
[D]I keep running on empty
[A]Thinking maybe I'll see a [G]sign
But if I [D]open up my [A]heart, someone will say

{comment: Chorus}
[Bm]A......... [G]A...... Ame[D]n

{comment: Verse 2}
[Bm]I'm tired of this scene, and all that means
No company [D]cool will define me
[Bm]I'm tired of this screen staring at me
No radiant box[D] could confine me

(Pre Chorus)
And [G]I...
[D]I keep running on empty
[A]Thinking maybe I'll see a [G]sign
But if I [D]open up my [A]heart, someone will say

{comment: Chorus}
[Bm]A......... [G]A...... Ame[D]n

{comment: Bridge}
[G]And out of the dark (the d[D]arke[A]st [G]night)
[G]I wanna follow my heart (i[D]nto [A]the[G] light)
[G]So what am I waiting for? (Waiting[A] f[D]or?)

(Pre Chorus)
[D]I keep running on empty
[A]Thinking maybe I'll see a [G]sign
But if I [D]open up my [A]heart, someone will say

{comment: Chorus}
[Bm]A......... [G]A...... Ame[D]n

title: Book Smart Street Stupid
body:
{comment: Verse 1}

[C]I was born by an [Am]old streetlight
Where the [G]men lean out of their [F]windows at night
And [C]I was a lead in the [Am]orphan choir
And I [G]sang with all my [F]might
[E]Until I grew up too[F] high[G]
Then, [C]oh, all the notes I[Am] used to play
On the [G]double bass and the [F]B-list ballet
With [C]only the night bugs to [Am]lead me home
With their [G]sad luck s[C]eren[F]ade

(Pre Chorus)
The [E]rain was never [Am]ending
The s[E]adness in my h[Am]eart[E]
Would [C]light
And [G]glow in the [C]dark[Am][G][C][G]

{comment: Chorus}
Oh [F]this will never [C]chang[E]e
[F]Time just wears a p[C]rettier [E]face
[F]I'm book smart
[C]Street [G]stupid

{comment: Verse 1}
So, [C]don't look for me in [Am]confession booth
I'm with my [G]paints, and my pens, and my [F]dry vermouth
[C]Trying to uncover s[Am]ome small truth
With these [G]cards close to my [F]chest

(Pre Chorus)
The [E]rain still never [Am]ending
The s[E]adness in my h[Am]eart[E]
Still [C]lights
And [G]glows in the[C] dark[Am][G][C][G]

{comment: Chorus}
Oh [F]this will, can never [C]chang[E]e
Time just [F]wears a prettier [C]face[E]
[F]I'm book smart
[C]Street stup[G]id[C][G]

{comment: Outro}

[Am]Oh oh oh[G][F]
And the [E]rain still never [Am]ending
The w[E]onder in my he[Am]art[E]
Still [C]lights and [G]glows in
Still [C]lights and [G]glows in
The [C]dark[Am][G][C]

title: Duncan
body:
Artist: Sarah Slean
Song:   Duncan
Album:  Night Bugs (2002)
Tabbed by: neuroxik
Email: neuroxik (-at) gmail (dot-) com

Tuning: Standard (EADGBe), CAPO IV (4th pos)
Time sig: 6/4 @158 bpm, key of Cmaj (Emaj non-relative to Capo)

See notes at end of chords/tab

(Chords)

[F(b5)]x-x-3-2-0-x     [F6]x-x-3-2-3-1     [Cmaj7]x-3-2-0-0-0     [C]x-3-2-0-1-0     [Dm]x-x-0-2-3-1

[G7]x-x-3-0-3-1     [Em]0-2-2-0-0-0     [E]0-2-2-1-0-0     [E7]0-2-2-1-3-0     [Am]x-0-2-2-1-0
[A]x-0-2-2-2-0     [Dm]x-0-3-2-3-1
                *("love" in chorus, with A as root, but NOT in 2nd chorus)
==============================================================================

Piano adap. & slightly simplified for gtr.

{comment: Verse 1}
[F]  Whatever happened to [Cmaj]Dun-  [C]can?
[F]   He was a [F6]good boy [F]they [C]say[Cadd9][C]
[F]  The girls all[F6] wanted hi[F]m to [Cmaj7]dance   [C]with, the [Dm]boys to play, to [G]play
[F]  When the policeman came [Cmaj7]kno-   [C]cking,
[F]  she didn't [F6]know wh[F]at to [C]say[Cadd9][C]
[F]  Except his [F6]shoes and so[F]cks were [Cmaj7]all    [C]gone, it [Dm]seems he ran a-[G]way

{comment: Chorus}
[C]Oh, you fool, you [Em]fool!  [Dm]Don't give into [G]fate. If this is
[E]all we've [E7]got to [Am]fight [A]for, [Dm]rage my darling, [G]rage!
[C]Duncan, good for [Em]you! [Dm]Sad but on your [G]way, well the
[E]Army [E7]never [F]turned his crank, but [Dm]love sure [G]made him -
                                 *
{comment: Bridge}
(repeat intro, simile)
[F(b5)]brave[F6][F][F(b5)][Cmaj7][C]
[F(b5)]          [F6]         [F]   [F(b5)]       [C] 
[F(b5)]          [F6]         [F]   [F(b5)]       [Cmaj7]           [C] 
[Dm]          [Dmadd9]                   [Cadd9]           [G]         [G7]  

{comment: Verse 2}
[F]  A sweeter infatu-[Cmaj7]a-    -[C]tion
[F]  Oh you'd be [F6]hard pr[F]essed to [C]find[Cadd9][C]
[F]  He loved so [F6]deeply[F]      [Cmaj7] mad-  [C]ly, he [Dm]nearly lost his[G] mind
[F]  And oh behold the mayor's [Cmaj7]daugh- [C]ter
[F] She was a [F6]treat for[F] the  [C]eye
[F]  Why this the [F6]only thi[F]ng to [Cmaj7]live   [C]for, just [Dm]made  t[G]o die!

{comment: Chorus}
[C]Oh, you fool, you [Em]fools!  [Dm]Don't give into [G]fate. If this is
[E]all we've [E7]got to [Am]fight [A]for, [Dm]rage my darling, [G]rage!
[C]Duncan, good for [Em]you! [Dm]Sad but on your [G]way, well the
[E]Army [E7]never [F]turned his crank, but [Dm]love sure [G]made him -

(STRINGS 'SOLO')
[C]brave.    [Em]          [Dm]La, da-da, da-[G]da

[E]     [E7]     [Am]      [A]    [Dm]              [G]     Laaaa...
{comment: Chorus}
[C]This is holy w[Em]ar! We must [Dm]fight and fight a-[G]gain, and go a 
[E]thousand [E7]times for the[F] sake of love, but [Dm]never [G]once in -

{comment: Outro}
(repeat intro, simile)
[F(b5)]vain      [F6]         [F]   [F(b5)]       [Cmaj7]           [C]Oh-
[F(b5)]oh[F6][F][F(b5)][C]
[F(b5)]          [F6]         [F]   [F(b5)]       [Cmaj7]           [C] 

(Replace 2 last measures of intro with this)
(slowing down)
e|--[Dm]--------1---[G7]----[D5]----[G7]----|--[C]------------8---------------------------------|
B|--3-------3---3-----------|------------------------------------------------|
G|--2---2-------4---2---4---|--9--------9------------------------------------|
D|--0-----------3---0---3---|--10--------------------------------------------|
A|--------------5---0---5---|--10---10---------------------------------------|
E|--------------3-------3---|--8---------------------------------------------|

***********************************

•  Staccato
h  Hammer-on
p  Pull-off

***********************************

NOTES:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Suggested fingering for meas. #7. 1 = index, 4 = pinky

e|--1---------------0-h1-p0--------|
B|--3------3---------------------1-|
G|------2--------------------------|
D|--0---------2-h3------------0----|
A|---------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------|
    1   2  4  1  3     1
    4

- The Cmaj7 in the verse is open to interpretation. The piano does an E5, the
bass an E, but the overall tonality is Cmaj7 as she then augments to C. You 
could choose to play an Em instead of Cmaj7, but I found it didn't really 
translate well.

- The F6 could've also been interpreted as Dm but the bass does F when she
echoes the same patterns during the verses, and strumming an F6 with (in whole)
its F root sounds better, either placing thumb on 1st fret or whichever way.

- The way you arpeggiate the chords can be more guitar-style driven. Some 
notes within went an octave higher so I kept them lower (ie. not jump to 12th 
fret), but some progressions translated into a more dull result. Example: 
where an E was followed by a higher E, remaining in that lower octave made the
arpeggio less interesting so I took the liberty to substitute some of the 
notes to still give the same climb/descend effect.

title: Euphoria
body:
Euphoria - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[F#m]Take me love me 
invade the portions of me
That are [Bm]dark and warm and [F#m]deep

Hero or zero 
I'm glad that you are here
So take your [Bm]love, take your [F#m]leave

[C#]Now how will I fall [Bm]asleep?

I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
[Bm]You built the maze
In my [A]lover's [E]face
Oh, I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
This s[D]tate of [C#]grace

[F#]I could have held him
But alas the dawn compelled him 
To [Bm]walk into the [F#]street

His [F#]arms are swinging 
And maybe he is singing
with those [Bm]lips that now taste like [F#]me

[C#]how am I supposed to fall [Bm]asleep?

I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
[Bm]You built the maze
In my [A]lover's [E]face
Oh, I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
[Bm]You built the maze
In my [A]lover's [E]face
I'm [Bm]onto ya ...
Eu[F#m]phoria[E]
This s[D]tate of [C#]grace

[F#]

title: Get Home
body:
**Sat down at the piano and roughed this one out. It works for both piano and 
guitar - hope that you find it helpful! Feel free to mess around with it, and be creative!** 

Song: Get Home
Artist: Sarah Slean
Album: The Baroness 

You can s[C]tay the night
You can l[Dm]ook me in the eye
You can f[F]ake your way to the f[C]inish line
But don't you d[C]are profess to love me
When you're l[Dm]ying to another
That's not lo[F]ve, that's just wishing
Wish and l[Dm]ove are not the same thing
[C]Yeah

[C]Get home, g[F]et home
Take a look at h[C]er
[C]You know, y[F]ou know
That you love h[Dm]er[F]

Mister m[C]asquerade
Getting g[Dm]ood at this charade
Go on, f[F]ool yourself with talk of p[C]oetry
But don't you d[C]are pretend you're sorry
To [Dm]me you're just a tourist
Gotta s[F]tand next to the real ones
'Cause you k[Dm]now you'll never be one
[C]Yeah

(Repeat Following Twice) 

[C]Get home, g[F]et home
Nothing more to s[C]ay
[C]You know, y[F]ou know
That you'll never c[Dm]hange 
Oh, you'll never ch[F]ange
And I don't p[Dm]lay the game[G]

[C]With liars and cowards
[Dm]With liars and cowards
[F]With liars and cowards
[C]Like you

        [C]  

**Hope that you all enjoy the Chords. They're very easy to play and sound good on 
guitar and piano. This is my first posting so I hope that it's a-okay!**

title: Hopeful Hearts
body:
Sarah Slean - Hopeful Hearts
From The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

title: I Want To Be Brave
body:
Official Website: http://www.sarahslean.com
Sarah Slean is from Canada.  She released several EPs before her official
debut album, Nightbugs, in 2002.  She also went to the University of Toronto.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                       I Want To Be Brave by Sarah Slean
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tabbed by:Susan Jupinder
Email:xylophonesusan@yahoo.ca

Tuning:standard
From the album: Blue Parade

(this song is also known as "madeliene")

*capo 1*

[Bm]                [Em7]                                  [F#]           
[A7]           

{comment: Verse}
[Bm]Madeliene, should our [Em7]story end
With these [Bm]aftermath music
[Em7]My broken French?
[Bm]Heal her, if [Em7]you can 
Pray the [Bm]lions aren't waiting
[Emsus]Take her hand

{comment: Chorus}
I want to be [G]brave, I want to be [A7]brave 
But the [D]night goes up in [Em]flames
The courage we [D]need
A f[A7]ury to tame this [Bm]madness, this [Bm]madness, this [Em7]madness[F#]

{comment: Verse}
And [Bm]no more will I count the [Em7]dead 
Bending, [Bm]gathering words he [Em7]should've said
And [Bm]night falls and [Em7]scrapes his knees
We watch the [Bm]houses on fire
And she [Emsus]says to me

{comment: Chorus (As Above)}

{comment: Verse}
Over [D]time, luck runs [D]out
And fate is [Em]not your [A7]friend
Over [D]time, good must [D]go
And were we [Em]safe, safe [A7]yet?[Bm]

{comment: Outro}
[Bm]Madeliene 
Can I [Em7]escape again?
Out of the [Bm]dragonfly jar
Am [Em7]I safe yet?

title: Life
body:
{comment: Intro}
[Em]  

{comment: Verse 1}
[Em]Nights, nights of the [G]Ice Age
Wind [D]soft, the land was a[C]sleep
Like the [Em]ice, ice in our [G]memories
[D]Melting [C]finally[Em]

{comment: Chorus}
In the f[Bm]ire of [G]life, [Bm]life
Oh heat div[G]ine, lif[Bm]e
This [C]fire that created u[Em]niverses
[D]Life, l[C]ife

{comment: Verse 2}
[Em]Their old world in [G]ruins
The d[D]reamers fell to their [C]knees
No [Em]common war to [G]arrange them
They [D]dreamt of common [C]peace
It's the [Em]end, end of an [G]empire
N[D]o more lines in the [C]sand
[Em]And the dawn, dawn of a [G]new world
[D]Gone, imperial [C]man[Em]

{comment: Chorus}
In the [Bm]fire of li[G]fe, li[Bm]fe
Oh heat div[G]ine, lif[Bm]e

[G]life[Bm]

In the [Bm]fire of li[G]fe, li[Bm]fe
Oh heat div[G]ine, lif[Bm]e
This [C]fire that created u[Em]niverses

Same as verses, sing oooo life
On last life...

{comment: Outro}
[Em]

title: Looking For Someone
body:

The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

I've been l[F]ooking for [C]someone
But I d[F]on't know his [C]name
All the fa[B]ces be[Am]fore me
Well they all look the [G]same
But there's [F]got to be [C]one face
And [F]one pair of [Em]eyes
That'll [G]light me on [Am]fire

But I k[B]now when I [Am]find him

For this [G]day

[G]  [Am] Oh, I'm l[G]ooking for [F7]someone
Who's [G]looking for [C]me[F][C][F][C][F][C]

title: No Place At All
body:
No Place At All - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[C]No place at all to [G/B]call my own
Still [C]wandering the [G/B]world
And [C]friends of mine are [Em7]moving on
Getting [F]comfortable cars
Getting [C]married[F][C]

[C]In someone else's [G/B]neighbourhood
[C]I hear a tele[G/B]phone[A]
[C]Who lives in those well-[Em7]lighted homes
With their [F]windows aglow in the [C]evening?[F][C]

[G]Look at me [G7]crying in my [C]sleep
[Eb]No one has to [G]rescue me
[D]I'm no place at [G]all

the [C]sun goes down be[G/B]yond the trees
No [C]sound, no trace of [G/B]wind
The [C]world is calm and [G/B]beautiful
But it's [F]breaking my heart comp[C]letely[F][C]

[G]Look at me [G7]crying in my [C]sleep
[Eb]No one has to [G]rescue me
It's [D]plain to see[Em]
[C]I'm no place at [Am]all
I'm [D]no place at[D#] all[E]
.... [D]no place at [C]all

[G]Look at me [G7]crying in my [C]sleep
[Eb]No one has to [G]rescue me
It's [D]plain to see
[G]Could it be I'm [G7]following this [C]reverie
[Eb]To nowhere and to [G]nobody
[Em]To no place at all
[D]To no place at all[G][D]

title: Notes From The Underground
body:
Notes from the Underground - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[Dm]Notes from the [C]underg[G]round
We're the [Dm]mice who must [C]write our l[G]ives down
In the [F]night I hear you [C]calling out to say
"It's al[E7]right, love, you're in good [F]hands."

[Dm]Tears on a [C]borrowed [G]bed
Between [Dm]walls that are [C]painted [G]somebody else's red
If you [F]hear me cry I'm [C]calling out to say
"It's [E7]alright, love, you're in good [F]hands."

[C]Still out on the [F]roof
Howling at the [Am]moon
Exiles
Another [G]exile in the kingdom
[C]Still out on the [F]roof
All I need is [Am]you
Exiles
We are [G]exiles
We [Dm]two[C][G]

[Dm]Love with the [C]love they [G]hide
[Dm]Dream with the [C]dream they [G]cast aside
Oh the [F]truth will form and [C]fall apart again
It's [E7]alright love, you're in good [F]hands

[C]Still out on the [F]roof
Howling at the [Am]moon
Exiles
Another [G]exile in the kingdom
[C]Still out on the [F]roof
All I need is [Am]you
Exiles
We are [G]exiles
We [F]two

They don't trust the likes of you and [G]I
They kick our verses [Dm]aside
But we know the road is [F]wide, that's why

[C]Still out on the [F]roof
Howling at the [Am]moon
Exiles
Another [G]exile in the kingdom
[C]Still out on the [F]roof
I'm a dreamer [Am]too
Exiles
We are [G]exiles
We [Dm]two[C][G]

title: Please Be Good To Me
body:
Please Be Good to Me - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[G]     [D]     [G]     [C]     [G] 

[G]I carried my heart unbuttoned
[Am]Across the lonely stage
[G]Where all the fools and actors
[Am]Circled like birds of prey
But [C]careful with the rose, [B7]she knows
[Em]Every word in every s[C]cene

[G]O please be [D]good to [G]me[C][G]

[G]I let the liar have me
[Am]The forger and the cheat
[G]Love is the legal tender
[Am]They tried to steal from me
[C]Tell me how you lose
[B7]What you [Em]wanna give away for f[C]ree

[G]O please be [D]good[D7] to me

[C]     [Am]      [C]     [Am]                    [E]   [F#]   [B]  [E]   [F#]    [B]  [E]   [F#]    [B]   [F#]   [G]   [D]  

[G]When love's light is shining elsewhere
[Am]The cold is hard to shake
[G]But when it's shining on you
[Am]The winter melts away
[C]I don't want to kno[B7]w how so 
[Em]I just want to feel the [C]heat

[G]O please be [D]good[D7] to me

[C]     [Am]      [C]     [Am]                 [E]   [F#]   [B]  [E]   [F#]    [B]  [E]   [F#]    [B]   [F#]   [G]   [D]  

[C]O please be good
[Am]O please be good
[C]Please be good [D]to me[C]

title: Shadowland
body:
Shadowland - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[Cm7]      [Cm7]    [Ab]  

I have [Cm7]been to the shadowland
I [Cm7]hear[Ab]d the empty call
of [Cm7/F]hatred, anorexia
[Cm7]Mise[Ab]ry and alcohol[Gm][B]

By their [Cm7]hearths I warmed myself
To es[Cm7]cape[Ab] from the winter years
Until I [Cm7/F]saw in the window
Myself [Cm7]cryi[Ab]ng fire-coloured tea[Gm]rs[B]

[Cm]Love, the only alchemy
[Cm]Lov[Ab]e, the killer of despair
[Cm]Lov[F]e, the patient samurai
[Cm]Lov[Ab]e, the armour angels wea[Gm]r[B]
[Cm]Love[Cm7][Ab]

They [Cm7]turned away the prophet
Because she was [Cm7]youn[Ab]g and full of longing
Instead they [Cm7/F]turned to the magistrate
Who was [Cm7]busy[Ab] yawning[Gm][B]

And they [Cm7]try to sell me holy books
But I can [Cm7]see [Ab]their eyes are wild
I caught them [Cm7/F]pouring shame and fear
Into the [Cm7]perf[Ab]ect vessel of a chil[Gm]d[B]

[Cm]Bue love's the only alchemy
[Cm]Lov[Ab]e, the killer of despair
[Cm]Lov[F]e, the true nobility
[Cm]Lov[Ab]e, the armour angels wear[Gm][B]
[Cm]Love

[Cm7]Love[Ab] will make your eyes clear
[Cm7/F]The order of the universe
[Cm7]The [Ab]only reason we are here[Cm7]

title: So Many Miles
body:
So Many Miles - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[A]These feet have walked so many miles
And on so many continents
Still this heart is beating wild
As yet of no great consequence 
but [D]oh
                   F#m (add4 - drop the C# to B for the second 4 counts)
when the rhythm is right
I catch a [D]wind and [E]fly

[A]Far beyond these Paris nights
Into another consciousness
The fortune teller isn't right
It's scary but it's glorious
And [D]oh
            F#m (add4 - drop the C# to B for the second 4 counts)
I know this time
I'll catch a [D]wind and [E]fly

[D]So many miles
[F#m]Those days are gone
[D]You're still alive
[F#]And after so,
[D]So many miles
[F#]So [E]many [D]miles[C#][B][A][G#]

[A]I open up my weary eyes
To gaze upon the firmament
Again I'm under foreign skies
But longing's all that's permanent
And [D]oh
            F#m (add4 - drop the C# to B for the second 4 counts)
I know this time
I'll catch a [D]wind and [E]fly

[D]So many miles
[F#m]Those days are gone
[D]You're still alive
[F#]And after so,

And [D]oh
I know this [F#m]time
I'll catch a [D]wind and [E]fly

[D]So many miles
[F#m]Those days are gone
[D]You're still alive
[F#]And after so,
[D]So many miles
[F#]So [E]many [D]miles

You're still alive

body:

title: St Francis
body:
{comment: Verse}
[C]Just like St. Francis
The little birds c[F]ome
Lonely for a l[C]ittle w[G]arm
[C]You give them your music
But they just want a [F]song
Oh, no, I'll [C]never l[G]earn

{comment: Chorus}

[Am]But I'd make beautifu[C]l sounds
I'd lay you d[F]own like a[G] lover would
[Am]My pride, still standin' s[C]traight
But looking [F]back
I wasn't so b[G]rave
I wasn't so [F]brave[G]

{comment: Verse}

[C]Flying through tunnels
At the mouth of [F]New York
Sometimes, I be[C]long [G]here
But it's f[C]unny how leaving
Turns the emptiness [F]up
The hole you never h[C]eard [G]before

{comment: Chorus}

[Am]Oh, I laugh in my [C]hands
A kiss from that m[F]an
Like a m[G]elody
[Am]My pride still standing
Looking t[C]all
But looking [F]back
I wasn't brave at a[G]ll

{comment: Bridge}
I wasn't brave a[F]t all[G]
Was I?..[Am]Brave...Was I?
[C]Brave...Was I? 
[F]Brave...[G]

{comment: Chorus}

[Am]I'd make beautiful s[C]ounds
I'd lay you d[F]own like a [G]lover would
[Am]On the phone, I started to [C]say
But then I [F]stopped
I used to be [G]brave
I used to be [F]brave[G]

{comment: Outro}
[C]Here's hoping next time, we'll get it r[F]ight
(END ON C)

title: Willow
body:
Willow - Sarah Slean
The Baroness (2008)
Transcribed by Kristilyn

[A]     [E] 

[A]Willow tree by the sea
Where the gods [E]lie, 
How I love to look at you
With all my aching [A]eye
Winter comes, winter kills, 
[A7]Let it go [D]by
[A]There'll be better [F#m]days
[E]Willow [E7]
Don't [A]cry[E]

[A]Little star, shine afar
In the dark [E]sky
You're the one I'm wishing on
With all my weary [A]might
Tell the trees, if you please
[A7]That it's alri[D]ght
[A]There'll be better [F#m]days
[E]Willow[E7]
Don't [F#m]cry[E][D][C#]

[F#m]      [E]     [D]     [A]     [E] 

[A]River bend
River sigh
River so [E]wide
Wash away the worry 
From my lonely heart [A]tonight
Lover comes 
Lover goes
[A7]Let him go [D]by
[A]There'll be better [F#m]days
[E]Willow[E7]
Don't [F#m]cry[E][D][C#]
